# Artifacts for max-total-size testing
# name|size_bytes|creation_epoch|workflow_run_id
# Total size: 1000+2000+3000+4000+5000 = 15000
# With limit 10000, oldest should be deleted first
item-newest|1000|1699900000|wf-1
item-new|2000|1699800000|wf-1
item-mid|3000|1699700000|wf-1
item-old|4000|1699600000|wf-1
item-oldest|5000|1699500000|wf-1
